_meta.purpose: Append-only, operator-curated changelog of every change to a coach's prompt, voice spec, persona, few-shot set, or model (CC-03). Git history is the audit trail; this file is the human-readable surface rendered in each coach's Report Card (CC-02) — 'here's how this coach changed, when, why, and whether it helped.'
_meta.discipline: Any diff to a config/coaches/<coach>.json voice block (structural_voice_rules / few_shot_examples / decision_style / anti_pattern_detection / display_name / domain) must be accompanied by a new entry here, with date >= the current tip. Enforced by tests/test_coach_tuning_logged.py. Coach-prompt edits in lambdas/ai_calls.py follow the same convention by hand (not gated automatically — too coarse to diff reliably).

entry_schema.coach: an operational coach_config_key (persona_registry) or 'all' for cross-coach
entry_schema.observed_effect: filled in later when measurable, else null

_meta.ordering: ascending by date; append new entries at the end

entries.summary: Board opening rule + journal-coach tone + TL;DR specificity tightened.
entries.rationale: Briefs were opening with generic compliments and vague TL;DRs; added an opening rule and specificity requirement.

entries.summary: Initial 8 coach voice configs created (Coach Intelligence Architecture v6.0.0).
entries.rationale: Stood up the per-coach persona/voice specs under config/coaches/.
Needed an automated check that each coach speaks in its own voice from day one (Intelligence Layer V2).

entries.summary: Wired coach-quality-gate into the daily pipeline.
entries.rationale: Voice/decision-class violations were shipping unchecked; the gate now scores each output before it lands.

entries.summary: Opening rule: stop outputs opening with 'Matthew' / generic effort compliments.
entries.rationale: ai_validator flagged opening drift — the prompt instruction to stay in-voice was being ignored and outputs kept opening with the user's name.

entries.summary: A-grade quality gates: PASS_SCORE_THRESHOLD=60 + voice-distinctiveness floor=40.
entries.rationale: Promoted the quality gate to a hard A-grade standard so cross-coach sameness and weak voice get caught.

entries.summary: Coach memory: each coach's track record is now injected into its prompt.
entries.rationale: Coaches were amnesiac about their own prior calls; track-record context lets them reference and learn from past predictions.

entries.summary: Stage-ladder stances authored for all 8 coaches (config/coaches/<coach>_stance.json).
entries.rationale: CC-09: each coach now has a per-stage philosophy (read_of_him / cares_most / cares_less_right_now / plan / graduation_gate / watches) so the coaching visibly levels up as Matthew progresses. Nutrition stance wellbeing-guarded.
